name: Spanish
note: A grade of C (2.0) or higher must be earned in all courses. SPA-115, SPA-125, and SPA-135 are not counted toward the major. SPA-148 Spanish Literature in Translation may be taken as one of the eight. One Hispanic literature course (SPA-336 or above) must be taken in the senior year. Up to three courses may be substituted by study abroad. A minimum of four courses must be numbered 315 or above.

sections.label: Eight Courses Beyond Intermediate Spanish II
sections.description: Eight courses in Spanish beyond Intermediate Spanish II (SPA-225). SPA-148 may count as one. A minimum of four must be numbered 315 or above.
